name: Omeleta Me Lahanika Ke Feta (Vegetable Omel
recipeInstructions:
If using canned peas and carrots, drain them and rinse with fresh water.
1. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a pan.
2. Add the cooked vegetables; sauté for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. In another frying pan, heat remaining butter.
5. Beat eggs with milk or water.
6. Pour egg mixture into hot pan and cook until set.
7. Top the omelet with vegetables and feta cheese.
8. Fold in half and serve immediately.
